scenarios.label: Controlled Grind
scenarios.path: Higher lows above VWAP into lunch session.
scenarios.invalidation: Price stays below 24620 for ten minutes with rising sell volume.

scenarios.label: High-Level Compression
scenarios.path: Range rotation between resistance and VWAP.
scenarios.invalidation: Break and hold above 24745 with high volume.

scenarios.label: Late-Day Fade
scenarios.path: Failed breakout and acceptance back into value.
scenarios.invalidation: Sustained buy imbalance reclaims failed auction zone.

market_mechanics: Liquidity pocket at 24720-24730 was cleared and defended.
Repeated failed pushes into 24650 imply seller exhaustion.
